title: StasisRods
description: This mod makes using Fishing Rods for Ender Pearl Stasis Chambers easier.
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/dacl) This mod modifies the way the Fishing Rod bug works so it's easier to use. In Vanilla Minecraft you can teleport anywhere by building an Ender Pearl Stasis Chamber on a Chunk Border, you do this by placing a Fishing Rod on a Pressure Plate and then unload that Chunk. This way the server doesn't know you still have a Fishing Bobber attached to your Fishing Rod and now you can use that Fishing Rod at anytime to refresh it causing the Stasis Chamber to activate. The problem with this is that if you leave and rejoin the bobber is immediately despawned. This mod fixes that by manually keeping the pressure plate activated when clicked on with a Fishing Rod instead of using the Bobber. This way you can store the Fishing Rod anywhere, leave and rejoin as much as you like and when you use the Fishing Rod again it will always activate. This mod has one config option: * **Damage taken on Fishing Rod pull:** The amount of damage a Fishing Rod should take after it's pulled. Defaults to 1. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods?
